reason: Successfully navigated to the agent, sent a math question, and received the correct response "4" within the timeout period.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Application loaded successfully showing the sidebar with three agents listed.
Found and clicked on agent "QA-20260415-203411-3esx" in the sidebar - Agent detail page opened successfully.
Verified agent status is "idle" - Status indicator showed "idle" which is an acceptable status (running or idle).
Typed message "Hello! What is 2+2?" in the message input field - Message was entered successfully and the send button became enabled.
Clicked the send button to submit the message - Message was sent successfully, agent status changed to "working", and a new session "Basic Math Question Session" was created.
Waited up to 3 minutes for agent response - Agent responded within approximately 1 second with the answer "4".
Verified response mentions "4" - The agent's response displayed "4" as the answer to the math question, followed by "Worked for 1s".
Took screenshot of the final result - Screenshot captured showing the complete conversation with the correct response.
